errors.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen

context.text: For prefix: /iati-activities/iati-activity/reporting-org/@ref = 'BE-BCE_KBO-0408643875' at line: 6, column: 34 and /iati-activities/iati-activity/iati-identifier = 'NP-IRD-qareg1-15' at line: 5, column: 5

ruleInfo.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen

errors.title:
Prog2017-2021_commun_ASE-OS: About 200.000 organised marginalised workers in Cambodia,
        Vietnam and Laos, in particular women, can exert their rights and increase their economic and social resilience
        by influencing the relevant decision makers to expand, finance and deliver social protection more effectively
        and equitably.

errors.message: The description must contain narrative content.

ruleInfo.message: The description must contain narrative content.
